## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `cd codex-native && npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `cd codex-native && npm test`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Relevant installer smoke test ran

## Public Readiness

- [ ] No machine-specific absolute paths added
- [ ] No personal identifiers added
- [ ] README/docs updated for any user-facing behavior changes
